title: Monday apps office hours -- we want to know what you're building!
excerpt:
Are you a developer writing apps on top of monday.com? We want to hear from you, so we are opening Office Hours for Builders :beers:  Sign up here.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you a developer writing apps on top of monday.com? We want to hear from you, so we are opening Office Hours for Builders Sign up here.

During these sessions, we want to hear your feedback on our apps framework: what are you building? How can we make the developer experience better? What has been difficult to implement?

We’re excited to meet you!
